The Vertiv™ PowerIT Monitored Rack PDU delivers reliable power distribution with real-time monitoring capabilities for critical IT infrastructure. Key features include:

- **Real-time Power Monitoring**: Local and remote monitoring with ±1% accuracy for input and circuit power readings
- **High-Capacity Support**: Models available up to 277V/480V for advanced compute and AI workloads
- **Upgradeable Monitoring**: Hot-swappable monitoring device allows upgrades without replacing the entire unit
- **Environmental Awareness**: Optional sensors for temperature and humidity monitoring
- **Enhanced Security**: Secure boot with hardware-based trust anchor and redundant power-sharing ports
- **Flexible Deployment**: Vertical and horizontal mounting options with various electrical configurations
- **U-Lock Technology**: Color-coded receptacles secure power cords and simplify circuit identification

Best suited for banking, data centers, healthcare, retail, and transportation industries. Backed by a five-year limited warranty and UL/ROHS/TAA compliance.
